attribute,identification	AgencyID
Consumer_Profiles
Consumer_Profiles includes the AgencyID as the identifier for the managing agency or organization.

attribute,identification	Consumer_Profiles
FirstName
Consumer_Profiles includes FirstName to capture the first name of each consumer.

attribute,financial	Consumer_Profiles
NetWorth
Consumer_Profiles includes the NetWorth column to record consumers' financial net worth.

attribute,employment	Consumer_Profiles
Employer
Consumer_Profiles contains the Employer column for the employer's name.

attribute,financial	Consumer_Profiles
NumberCreditCards
Consumer_Profiles records the number of credit cards held by the consumer in the NumberCreditCards column.

attribute,identification	Consumer_Profiles
LastName
Consumer_Profiles stores the last name of the consumer in the LastName column.

attribute,location	AddressLine2
Consumer_Profiles
Consumer_Profiles includes AddressLine2 for apartment or suite numbers.

MaritalStatus
Consumer_Profiles records marital status in the MaritalStatus column.

Gender

Phone
Consumer_Profiles contains the Phone column for consumer phone numbers.

Consumer_Profiles records the number of children in the consumer's household.

Consumer_Profiles
Consumer_Profiles contains Age to specify the consumer's age.

prospect_gncd

Consumer_Profiles

prospect_frstnm
